title: podman mount: yet another race: layer not known
body:
Triggered in [parallel system tests](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6309819978612736/html/sys-podman-fedora-40-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--00058p) with precious little to go on. I've reproduced via:
```console
Window 1:
# while :;do printf "FROM quay.io/libpod/testimage:20240123\nRUN date\n" | bin/podman build -t foo -;bin/podman rmi foo;done
```
```console
Window 2:
# while :;do bin/podman mount --notruncate || break;done
...
Error: layer not known
```
Took almost an hour to fail on 1mt. main @ 7899358ec9463c3a490664d9c948199ba9778ece (includes #23645)

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

Seen twice today, in the wild (not just in my pet PR)

* fedora-40 : sys podman fedora-40 root host sqlite
  * PR #23275
    * [08-19-2024 12:08](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6309819978612736/html/sys-podman-fedora-40-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--00058p) in [sys] |060| podman run --mount image
* rawhide : sys podman rawhide root host sqlite
  * PR #24073
    * [09-25 15:20](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5534559138217984/html/sys-podman-rawhide-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--00181p) in [sys] |200| podman pod create should fail when infra-name is already in use
  * PR #24069
    * [09-25 10:23](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6431848337768448/html/sys-podman-rawhide-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--00181p) in [sys] |200| podman pod create should fail when infra-name is already in use
  * PR #23275
    * [09-19 18:39](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6313176948539392/html/sys-podman-rawhide-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--00407p) in [sys] |700| podman play with image volume pull policies
